title: Review Approval
description: Human sign-off on a specific frozen candidate's FULL-LENGTH review render (task section 18) -- not a short proof cut. Final (1080p) render is blocked unless an approval exists whose candidate_hash matches the current frozen candidate exactly AND whose review_total_frames equals the candidate's own total_frames (a partial-duration cut cannot be approved as the review). `proof_artifact`/legacy top-level fields are retained only so historical approval records (from before this hardening) keep validating as a historical record; a NEW approval must use the review_* fields below.

candidate_hash.description: Same value as frozen_candidate_hash -- named per task section 18's required field list.

review_run_id.description: The 'ORVYQ Full-Length Candidate Review' workflow run that produced the approved review artifact.

review_total_frames.description: Must equal the frozen candidate's own total_frames -- a review of anything less than the full candidate cannot be approved.

review_video_sha256.description: sha256 of the actual reviewed MP4 file, so the approval names exact reviewed bytes, not just a run id.

proof_artifact.description: Legacy/historical field name (short-proof era) -- do not populate on a new approval; use the review_* fields instead.
